authors.author: Robert Gay
Robert Gay
Kein andrer Name als der Name Jesus

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v5 v6 v9 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: One name Holds weight above them all His fame Outlasts the Earth He formed

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: His praise Resounds beyond the stars And echoes in our hearts The greatest One of all

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His face Shines brighter than the sun His grace As boundless as His love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He reigns With healing in His wings The King above all kings The greatest One of all

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lift up our eyes See the King has come Light of the world Reaching out for us There is no other name There is no other name Jesus Christ our God, oh oh oh

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Seated on high The undefeated One Mountains bow down As we lift Him up There is no other name There is no other name Jesus Christ our God, whoa oh oh oh

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Find hope When all the world seems lost Behold The triumph of the cross

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: His power Has trampled death and grave Our life found in His name The greatest name of all

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: The Earth will shake And tremble before Him Chains will break As Heaven and Earth sing Holy is the name Holy is the name of Jesus, Jesus, Jesus
